title: Airtable Import Summary
description: Summary of the Airtable import operation including statistics and metadata

success.title: Success
success.description: Whether the import operation completed successfully

operation.title: Operation Type
operation.description: Type of import operation performed (append, override, or create)

baseId.title: Base ID
baseId.description: The Airtable base ID where data was imported

baseName.title: Base Name
baseName.description: The Airtable base name (if resolved from base identifier)

tableName.title: Table Name
tableName.description: Name of the Airtable table that received the imported data

datasetId.title: Dataset ID
datasetId.description: The Apify dataset ID that was used as the source of the import

totalItems.title: Total Items
totalItems.description: Total number of items in the source dataset

importedCount.title: Imported Records
importedCount.description: Number of records successfully imported to Airtable

skippedDuplicates.title: Skipped Duplicates
skippedDuplicates.description: Number of duplicate records that were skipped during import

clearedRecords.title: Cleared Records
clearedRecords.description: Number of existing records that were deleted before import (for override/clearOnCreate operations)

uniqueIdField.title: Unique ID Field
uniqueIdField.description: The source field used for duplicate detection (if configured)

uniqueIdTargetField.title: Unique ID Target Field
uniqueIdTargetField.description: The Airtable target field used for duplicate detection (if configured)

mappingsCount.title: Number of Field Mappings
mappingsCount.description: Number of field mappings used in the import

clearOnCreate.title: Clear on Create
clearOnCreate.description: Whether clearOnCreate was enabled (for create operation)

airtableUser.title: Airtable User
airtableUser.description: Information about the authenticated Airtable user

scopes.description: OAuth scopes granted to the user

startTime.title: Start Time
startTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the import started

endTime.title: End Time
endTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the import completed

duration.title: Duration (seconds)
duration.description: Total duration of the import operation in seconds
